text:
A duck swam lazily across a tranquil lake.

Suddenly it heard music booming from nowhere.

It dove deeper.

Something fluttered above.

A bee?

She didn't know.

It buzzed closer.

Then something gripped her leg.

It was tweety bird.

Why were you chasing me?

Just fun.

Maybe I ate her berries.

Could have ruined featherfall.

Just laugh.

You find something good?

We do.


Well find me?

I've got berries.

Just don't eat me.

Deal.

Come find me.
